basic_details.job_title: South Indian Bank Junior Officer Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: South Indian Bank Junior Officer (Operations) Recruitment 2026: Get the latest South Indian Bank recruitment notification 2026 for Junior Officer (Operations) vacancies for the States of Andhra Pradesh & Telangana. The online application process starts on 6th May 2026 and the last date to apply online is 13th May 2026. Apply only through the official online portal at https://recruit.southindianbank.bank.in/RDC/. You can also get Free Job Alert of "Upcoming South Indian Bank Junior Officer Recruitment 2026" notifications for freshers and experienced candidates. Beware of fraudulent job alerts -

important_dates.online test / group discussion date: To be notified on Bank's official website
important_dates.interview_date: To be notified on Bank's official website

application_fee.details: No application fee is required for this post. Candidates can apply free of cost through the official South Indian Bank recruitment portal.

age_limit.details: The maximum age limit is 28 years as on 31.03.2026. Age relaxation of 5 years is available for SC/ST candidates. Candidates belonging to SC/ST must submit attested copies of certificates from a competent authority to prove their status as and when called for.

qualification.education_qualification: Regular stream only: SSLC/SSC, HSC and Graduation (10+2+ Graduation under regular stream).
qualification.experience: Minimum 1 year of experience in Bank / NBFCs.
qualification.special note: Candidates who have attended Group Discussion / Personal Interview for Junior Officers role as per previous notification(s) and were not included in the final selection list are NOT eligible to apply.
qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on 31.03.2026. Only Indian Nationals are eligible to apply. Candidates who have previously attended Group Discussion / Personal Interview for the Junior Officers role as per any previous notification of the Bank and were not included in the final selection list are not eligible to apply for this notification. Proficiency in local language (Telugu) will be given preference. All eligibility is provisional and subject to verification of original documents when a candidate reports for interview/training/joining. | Educational Qualification

salary_details.salary_range: Rs. 4.86 lakhs to Rs. 5.04 lakhs per annum (inclusive of NPS contribution, Insurance Premium and Variable Pay)

selection_process: Stage 1 Online Test (if conducted) Elimination Stage - conducted at locations identified by the Bank
Stage 2 Group Discussion (if conducted) Elimination Stage - only Online Test qualified candidates called
Stage 3 Preliminary and/or Final Personal Interview Only Group Discussion shortlisted candidates advanced
The selection process for South Indian Bank Junior Officer Recruitment 2026 consists of an Online Test and/or Group Discussion

followed by a Preliminary and/or Final Interview. The Online Test and Group Discussion are elimination stages - only test-qualified candidates will be called for Group Discussion or Personal Interview

and only candidates shortlisted from the Group Discussion will be advanced to the Personal Interview. The Bank reserves the right to modify the selection process based on the number of applications received. Mere eligibility will not vest any right on the applicant to be called for the Recruitment Process. All marks/scores/grades at any stage shall be treated as strictly confidential.
how_to_apply: Applicants can apply online only through the Bank's official recruitment website at https://recruit.southindianbank.bank.in/RDC/ from 06-05-2026 to 13-05-2026. No other mode of application will be accepted. Before registering, applicants must ensure they have a valid Email ID and mobile number in their name. An applicant can only apply for vacancies in one State - making multiple registrations will result in disqualification.

There is no provision to modify the submitted online application - candidates are requested to fill in the application form with utmost care. After successful submission, a system generated User ID (Application Ref. ID) will be generated - candidates must note this for future reference. An email with the application PDF and login credentials will be sent to the registered email ID upon successful submission. The physical copy of the application need not be sent to the Bank.
Photograph: Recent passport size colour photo, white background, no caps/hats/dark glasses - Resolution: 378 x 437 pixels, maximum 50 KB (JPEG/JPG format)
Signature: Signed on white paper with black ink pen - Resolution: 140 x 110 pixels, maximum 50 KB
Resume: PDF format, file size not exceeding 1 MB
Education Documents: Certificates and marklists of X/SSLC (must include D.O.B), XII/HSC and final marklist and certificate of Graduation - combined as a single PDF file, not exceeding 3 MB
Documents to be Produced When Called for (Originals):
Proof of age (SSLC/SSC certificate with Date of Birth)
Educational qualification certificates and marklists (X, XII, Graduation)
Work experience certificate(s) proving minimum 1 year in Bank/NBFCs
SC/ST certificate from competent authority (if applicable)
Proof of nationality / domicile as applicable
Any other documents as required by the Bank
For queries, contact: Toll Free: 1800-425-1809 / 1800-102-9408, 0484-277-1383 | Email: [email protected]
important_instructions: Beware of fraudulent job alerts - apply only through the official online portal. Applications through any other mode will not be accepted. Candidates who have previously attended Group Discussion / Personal Interview for Junior Officers role as per any previous notification and were not included in the final selection list are NOT eligible to apply. An applicant can apply for vacancies in only one State - multiple registrations will lead to disqualification. There is no provision to modify the submitted online application - fill in all details carefully before submission. No application fee is required for this post. Appointment is subject to Medical fitness, satisfactory background verification including CIBIL/credit history check, police clearance, and completion of other formalities as per Bank rules. Canvassing in any form will be a disqualification. Applicants must appear for the Recruitment Process at their own cost. Call letters/advice will be sent by email only - no hard copy will be sent. Candidates are advised to check their registered email and the Bank's official website regularly. All marks/scores/grades obtained at any stage of the selection process are strictly confidential and will not be disclosed to any party including candidates. Applicants are advised to avoid last-minute rush and submit the online application well before the closing date, as website access may be delayed due to heavy internet traffic near the deadline. The Bank reserves the right to make modifications to the selection process and the qualifying criteria at any stage, and such decisions will be final and binding.

faq.question: Q1. What is South Indian Bank Junior Officer (Operations) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: South Indian Bank has released a notification for recruitment of Junior Officer (Operations) on contract basis for its Hyderabad and Vijayawada Regions, covering the states of Andhra Pradesh and Telangana.

faq.question: Q2. What are the application dates for South Indian Bank Junior Officer (Operations) 2026?
faq.answer: The online application window is open from 06 May 2026 to 13 May 2026, and candidates must apply only through the official South Indian Bank recruitment portal within these dates.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility criteria for South Indian Bank Junior Officer (Operations) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have any Graduation with minimum 50% marks in regular stream (10+2+Graduation) from a recognized university and minimum 1 year experience in Bank/NBFCs, with preference for proficiency in the local language (Telugu).

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for South Indian Bank Junior Officer (Operations) 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 28 years as on 31 March 2026 for General candidates, and SC/ST candidates get 5 years age relaxation, making their maximum eligible age 33 years.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for South Indian Bank Junior Officer (Operations) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for this recruitment, and candidates from all categories can apply free of cost through the official portal.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary/CTC for South Indian Bank Junior Officer (Operations)?
faq.answer: The total CTC ranges from Rs. 4.86 lakhs to Rs. 5.04 lakhs per annum, which includes NPS contribution, insurance premium, and performance‑based variable pay as per bank rules.

faq.question: Q7. What is the nature of employment for South Indian Bank Junior Officer (Operations)?
faq.answer: The post is purely on contract basis for an initial period of 3 years, renewable at the sole discretion of the Bank based on performance, with the possibility of high‑performing candidates being considered for regular Assistant Manager (Scale I) roles.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for South Indian Bank Junior Officer (Operations) 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes an Online Test and/or Group Discussion followed by a Preliminary and/or Final Personal Interview, and only shortlisted candidates at each stage will be called for the next stage.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply online for South Indian Bank Junior Officer (Operations) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates must apply online only through the official recruitment portal [https://recruit.southindianbank.bank.in/RDC/], register with a valid email ID and mobile number, fill the form carefully, upload the required documents, and submit the application on or before 13 May 2026; no other mode of application is accepted.

faq.question: Q10. Who is not eligible to apply for this Junior Officer (Operations) notification?
faq.answer: Candidates who have already attended Group Discussion/Personal Interview for the Junior Officer role in previous South Indian Bank notifications and were not included in the final selection list are not eligible to apply again under this notification.
